flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of the Mainland rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.8k → $2.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of the Mainland rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8k → 3.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Mainland rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (28.0% → 31.2%).
